jimmy@Jamess-MacBook-Pro ppz % claude
▗ ▗   ▖ ▖  Claude Code v2.1.119
           Opus 4.7 (1M context) · Claude Max
  ▘▘ ▝▝    ~/external-source/ppz

❯ tell me another story

⏺ A pipe walks into a bar. The bartender says, "We don't serve your kind here — you'll just drain
  through the floor."

  The pipe replies, "That's fine. I came for the atmosphere, not the contents."

  The bartender pauses, then pours a drink anyway. "On the house. What's your retention policy?"

  "24 hours," says the pipe. "After that, I forget everything."

  "Perfect," says the bartender. "Same as my customers."

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
❯ 
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Press Ctrl-C again to exit

claude --resume dce02586-1606-4817-a7a1-df634035611a
